title: Enchantery
body:
![Mod logo :shrug:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5dd5a5ed8f688fe0043c1908b80a282fa7a9611.png)
# About this mod:
So basically all it does is add a bunch (or not, currently) enchantments.
(top level description writing)

This mod was mainly created to try out minecraft mod development and as a side project.
## Enchantments:
### Lifespread
- Upon killing an enemy, `Bone Meal` would be applied to block right below them
- Only Enchantable on `Weapon`-type items

### Creepery
- Usable only on `Weapon` type tools and some certain items: `Amethyst Shard` and `Spyglass`
- Upon right-clicking with the item in main hand, an explosion is created in direction you're looking in

*everything in this mod is subject to change btw, nothing is final =)*
